sentences.arabic: تُقِيمُ الْمَدْرَسَةُ مَعْرِضًا لِلْكُتُبِ كُلَّ سَنَةٍ لِتَشْجِيعِ الطَّلَّابِ عَلَى الْقِرَاءَةِ.
sentences.translation: Škola svake godine organizira sajam knjiga kako bi poticala učenike na čitanje.
sentences.translationEn: The school holds a book fair every year to encourage students to read.
